title: campsis radicans f. aurea
intro: Campsis radicans f. aurea, also known as the Golden Trumpet Vine, is a variety of the Trumpet Vine plant, which is a flowering plant native to North America. The Golden Trumpet Vine has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Its medicinal properties also make it beneficial for promoting digestive health, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the Golden Trumpet Vine can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
